basic_details.short_information: Regional Centre for Biotechnology (RCB) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 1 Project-JRF Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Candidates with M.Sc. Biotechnology / Chemistry / Pharmacy / Pharmacology qualified with any National level test (NET, CSIR-UGC, GATE, GPAT). qualification can directly attend the interview on 31-07-2026.

content_sections.heading: RCB Project-JRF Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the RCB Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download RCB Project-JRF Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Sc. Biotechnology / Chemistry / Pharmacy / Pharmacology qualified with any National level test (NET, CSIR-UGC, GATE, GPAT).

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for RCB Project-JRF Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the RCB recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Regional Centre for Biotechnology (RCB) recruitment is Project-JRF.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project-JRF post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project-JRF post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Project-JRF post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is M.Sc. Biotechnology / Chemistry / Pharmacy / Pharmacology qualified with any National level test (NET, CSIR-UGC, GATE, GPAT).

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project-JRF position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 37,000/- + 27% HRA per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held on 31st July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the location of the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in Faridabad, Haryana (Pincode: 121001).

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for this recruitment for any category.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is 24/Project/2026/HR.
